title: Even More Explosives Mod
description:
TNT is not enough? then dynamite will make your world even better

This mod simply adds new dynamite and currently it has 50 types of dynamite, 12 new types of bombs, over 30 creeper types and a bomb launcher!!
body:
TNT is not enough? then dynamite will make your world even better

This mod simply adds new dynamite and currently it has 50 types of dynamite, 12 new types of bombs, over 30 creeper types and a bomb launcher!!

 

Before downloading be sure to check a short preview of all features of this mod!

Here:


Current Dynamite Types:
Dynamite - Basic explosive has only explosion radius of 1.
Scatter Dynamite - It's like Dynamite x8 but it's kinda worse!
Dynamite x10 - Explosive has same power as tnt.
Dynamite x100 - Now that's a one strong explosion.
Dynamite x500 - x100 is not enough then try this!
Dynamite x1000 - tnt looks like a joke compared to this.

Thunder Dynamite - Those aren't ordinary lightning strikes!
Levitation Dynamite - Did a Shulker spit on you?.
Gravity Dynamite - Ohh now you have power of gravity!
Lava Dynamite - It's hot isn't it?
Flame Dynamite - It's hot but not as hot as Lava Dynamite.
Water Dynamite - Be careful don't drown your self.
Death Trap Dynamite - Don't get stuck in there.
Pink Dynamite - Girls will love this for sure!
Nether Dynamite - I think Nether will be coming to visit us soon!
End Dynamite - End wants to visit as well!.
Mooshroom Dynamite - Mooshrooms are here!
Time Dynamite - If it's to dark it will make light and it can make dark as well!
Warp Dynamite - Behold the power of the Enderman!
Reverse Warp Dynamite - Well i don't think i need to tell you how it works.
Chicken Dynamite - If you don't have chickens, just throw this bad boy!
Cloud Dynamite - Guess it by your self :p.
Challenge Games Dynamite - I think everyone knows who i'm referring to , and on detonation it has more than 20 events that can happen.
Teleporting Dynamite - Since when did Dynamite learn to teleport?! :o
Gold Dynamite - Gold will consume everyone!

Troll Dynamite - Where did it explode?
Creeper Dynamite - Now you will make every creeper be triggered!
Sticky Dynamite - Where did it go, did it stick somewhere?
Digging Dynamite - Let's dig a hole, but beware it hates bedrock, obsidian , water and lava!
Diggint Dynamite(Warp) - Let's dig a hile and teleport mobs as well!
Dirt Dynamite - Does Dirt = life?
Soulsand Dynamite - Is Soulsand better then Dirt?
Glass Dynamite - Be carefull don't get hurt!
Stone Dynamite - Stone = Dirt < Cobblestone.
Sponge Dynamite - Now you can get all the water!
Spring Dynamite - Do you even jump bro? Yes i can jump 5 times!
Clay Dynamite - Is it even useful?
Festive Dynamite - Wooho! fireworks!!!
Slime Dynamite - Do you even split bro?
Illiusion Dynamite - I think this dynamite doesn't look right does it?
Weather Dyname - No more /weather clear!
Shearing Dynamite - Wooho get the sheep now!
Leaf Dynamite - Do you even leaf bro?
Ice Dynamite - Brr it's colder then snow!
Snow Dynamite - It's cold but not cold enough!
Cake Dynamite - Cake is a lie!
Sand Dynamite - Mhm it's useless.
Red Sand Dynamite - Another useless thing.
Blue Dynamite - Ohh boys will like it!
Ghostly Dynamite - Huh Where did it go? Wait does it fly? oh just dig down 25 blocks and see! :p
Vaporizing Dynamite - Begona lava, fire and water!


Current Bomb Types:
Bomb Launcher - To begin shooting bombs, first off all have a specific bomb type in your offhand and then shoot!

Explosion Bomb - Is it same as tnt?
Explosion Bomb X5 - Oh it's huge!
Explosion Bomb X25 - Well this will leave a mark!
Explosion Bomb X100 - Don't even try to throw it!
Explosion Bomb X250 - Just throw away before it's to late!
Chaotic Bomb - Why did you throw it?! the apocalypse has started!
Spike Bomb - Cactus and Sand Everywhere!
Heal Bomb - No more regen potions as this will be enough.
AntiHeal Bomb - Why do you even need this?
Heat Seeking Bomb - You can't escape it's wrath! just give up!
Scatter Heat Seeking Bomb - Why is it even here? 1 Bomb is enough but not 3, 5 or 8 bombs.
Sticky Seeking Bomb - Just throw it out and wait 1 minute and something may happen?

Current Creeper Types:
1.Fire Creeper
2.Gravity Creeper
3.Levitation Creeper
4. Pink Creeper
5.Thunder Creeper
6.Water Creeper
7.Dynamite Creeper
8.Reverse Warp Creeper
9.Lava Creeper
10.Warp Creeper
11.Deathtrap Creeper
12.Dynamite x10 Creeper
13.Tele Creeper
14.Challenge Games Creeper
15.Golden Creeper 
16.Scatter Creeper
7. Cloud Creeper
18.Time Creeper
19.Dynamite x100 Creeper
20.Dirt Creeper
21.Clay Creeper
22.Stone Creeper
23.Cake Creeper
24.Snow Creeper
25. Ice Creeper
26.Sand Creeper
27.Red Sand Creeper
28.Crainer Creeper
29.Ssunde Creeper
30.DanTDM Creeper
31.Supergirlygamer(Jen) Creeper
32.PopularMMOs(Pat) Creeper
33.Leaf Creeper
34. Blue Creeper

Mod Copyright for mod packs/distribution: [https://www.rolikdevelopment.com/mod-copyright/]

To do list:
- Creeper types for every dynamite.
- Rocket Launcher & Homing missiles.
- Lucky Dynamite & Lucky Creeper.
- Arrowstorm Dynamite.
- Mineshaft Dynamite.
- Wither Dynamite.
- Dynamite X5000.
- Napalm Dynamite.
- Firework Dynamite.
- Creeperstorm Dynamite.

- Dynamite Cannon

- Waterflood Bomb.
- Hell Bomb.
- Thunderstrike Bomb.
- Apocalyptic Bomb.
- Earth Buster Bomb.
- Mass Warp Bomb.
- Iceberg Bomb.
- Heat Seeking Gut Buster Bomb.

- Thea Creeper.
- Logdotzip Creeper.

P.s Don't try to use Gravity Dynamite on players as it will not work, also Gold Dynamite doesn't work on mobs that has more then 50 health points!

P.s most dynamites will be dropped by specific creepers also creepers have same spawn rate as original creeper.
